creator: drhowarddrfine@charter.net
text:
I installed this to run a non-port/pkg software. Afterwards, I am unable to uninstall e2fsprogs-libuuid using portmaster or pkg delete. I tried reinstalling but it also fails attempting to remove the old package.

===>>> Creating a backup package for old version e2fsprogs-libuuid-1.43.3_1

	e2fsprogs-libuuid-1.43.3_1

Number of packages to be removed: 1
